title: WebUIActionFormDescriptor
description: Schema for a WebUI action form descriptor. Describes the form fields, risk classification, confirmation requirements, and preview/execute labels for a single action rendered in the operation console. Derived from the action registry by action-form-schema.js. See docs/ai-native/webui-action-form-schema.md and docs/ai-native/webui-action-form-contract.md.

title.description: Human-readable action name shown as the form heading.

description.description: One-line purpose of this action, shown below the title.

category.description: Action category used for grouping in the UI.

risk.description: Risk classification. Controls confirmation escalation: low = single click, medium = dialog, high = dialog with preview, critical = typed phrase + reason.

privileged.description: When true, the action requires elevated privileges. Submit label becomes 'Execute (Privileged)'.

readOnly.description: When true, the action is read-only with no side effects. Submit label becomes 'View' and preview is not required.

defaultPreview.description: When true, the form defaults to preview mode before execute. True for all mutating actions.

fields.description: Ordered list of form field descriptors. Each field maps to a parameter the action requires.

hasConfirmMessage.description: When true, the action has a confirmation message shown before execute.

confirmPhrase.description: Exact phrase the operator must type to confirm execution (e.g. 'LAUNCH', 'MERGE'). Present for high-risk and critical actions.

docsUrl.description: Link to relevant documentation for this action (e.g. a governance doc or operation runbook).

riskHint.description: Human-readable hint explaining the risk or consequences of this action, shown in the confirmation warning banner.

submitLabel.description: Label for the primary submit button.

previewLabel.description: Label for the preview button. Always 'Preview'.

riskBadge.description: Visual risk badge metadata for rendering in the UI.

fieldDescriptor.description: Descriptor for a single form field. Maps to a parameter the action requires.

placeholder.description: Example or hint text shown in the input.

required.description: Whether the field must be filled before submit. Always true for action form fields.

autocomplete.description: Autocomplete source hint for the input.

helpText.description: Supplementary help text shown below the field.

hint.description: Short hint shown inline or as a tooltip.

options.description: Options for select fields. Each item is either a string or a {value, label} object.

fields.description: Nested field descriptors for object-type fields.
